name: UsefulGDLevels
description: Colon's Useful GD Levels site, but integrated into GD.

addButtonToLevelCells.name: Add Button To Level Cells
addButtonToLevelCells.description: Adds the button for viewing "useful level" info inside level cells.

ignoreCompactViewCells.name: Ignore Compact Mode Level Cells
ignoreCompactViewCells.description: For people who have too many buttons in level cells browsing levels.

maxDifficulty.name: Maximum Level Difficulty (Exclusive)
maxDifficulty.description:
For people who are allergic to Extreme Demons and such.

"Exclusive" means that levels at or above the difficulty you set in this setting will not be shown when searching for useful levels.

openAsLevelLists.name: "Go To Lists" Shows Level Lists Instead Of Individual Levels
openAsLevelLists.description: When pressing "Go To Lists" for levels whose lists you haven't fully completed, show the list of level lists instead of showing the individual levels from those lists.

sortLevelIDsByNumberOfListsTheyAppearIn.name: Sort Levels By Level List Frequency
sortLevelIDsByNumberOfListsTheyAppearIn.description: Sort levels by level list frequency in descending order (10, 9, 8, 7, etc...).

sortListIDsByNumberOfListsTheyAppearIn.name: Sort Level Lists By Progress to Completion
sortListIDsByNumberOfListsTheyAppearIn.description: Sort level lists by progress to completion based on percentage in descending order (10, 9, 8, 7, etc...).

showShortcutOnSearchLayerType.name: Show Useful Levels Shortcut On...
showShortcutOnSearchLayerType.description: Choose the type of search layer you want to show the shortcut button on.

forciblyShowEverything.name: Forcibly Show All Levels (READ!!!)
forciblyShowEverything.description:
# <c-ff0000>***__ENABLING THIS OPTION CAN GET YOU RATE-LIMITED FROM ROBTOP'S SERVERS. THIS OPTION MAY ALSO FREEZE YOUR GAME FOR A FEW SECONDS.__***</c>

Force the mod to show all levels that are considered "useful" for list grinding.

For your safety, this setting resets during every bootup, and has a confirmation popup.

issues.info: Ping me <cl>(@erymanthus)</c> in the Geode SDK Discord server's <cl>#help</c> channel if you need help. <cr>DMs are NOT accepted.</c>
